name: KAMIYO
description: KAMIYO protocol tools for OpenClaw agents: staked identity, escrow, private oracle consensus, meishi, and x402.

rpcUrl.description: Solana RPC URL used by KAMIYO and Meishi clients.

privateKey.description: Signer secret key as base64 or JSON byte array string.

apiBaseUrl.description: Optional KAMIYO API base URL for API-backed methods.

x402BaseUrl.description: x402 gateway base URL for price checks and settlement requests.

x402TimeoutMs.description: Default timeout for x402 HTTP requests.

x402MaxPriceSol.description: Maximum acceptable x402 price per request in SOL.
